prompt: Generate a top-down 3D render of a modern office space. Adopt the angular architectural style, glossy surfaces, and clean lines from the reference image, focusing on minimalist design elements and clear spatial layout.
prompt_refined: Generate a top-down 3D render of a modern office space. Adopt the distinct angular architectural style, glossy surfaces, and crisp, clean lines exemplified in image 1. Ensure the generated office space features minimalist design elements and a clear, well-defined spatial layout, consistent with the aesthetic demonstrated in image 1.
